text.title: DR Drill Script Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: announce drill to stakeholders; tag drill id
simulate trigger + start clock + confirm scenario
data integrity + smoke + replay; service-up alone not enough
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Drill phase? → matches branch "phase == pre_drill" → conclusion ref=r6-stakeholder-comms
